description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image for Maven builds and busybox:latest for the pages job, caches the .m2/repository directory, and defines the variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS as given. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a validate:jdk8 job that runs the command mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile. In the test stage add a verify:jdk8 job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage on all branches except master, and a deploy:jdk8 job that runs only on the master branch, executes mvn package, then mkdir target/st and mv target/jobmanager-*.jar target/st, and publishes the target/st directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on deploy:jdk8, runs only on master, runs the command mv target/st public using busybox, and publishes the public directory as the GitLab Pages artifact.
